title: Imperial Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Imperial Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!
